install.description: Whether to install/upgrade CRDs from templates/crds/. Set to false to manage CRDs externally.

enabled.description: Enable NetworkPolicy for the strimzi operator pod.

flavor.description: NetworkPolicy flavor: 'cilium' for CiliumNetworkPolicy, 'kubernetes' for standard NetworkPolicy.

enabled.description: Whether to create a KyvernoPolicyException for the operator.

namespace.description: Namespace where KyvernoPolicyExceptions are created (must match Kyverno's policyExceptionNamespace setting).

enabled.description: Create a PodMonitor to scrape operator metrics on port 8080.

labels.description: Labels added to the PodMonitor resource. Use 'observability.giantswarm.io/tenant' to route metrics to a Grafana Organization.
